channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Tenebris Somnia launches October 16
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Survival horror adventure game dated.

Survival horror adventure game Tenebris Somnia will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on October 16, publisher New Blood Interactive and developer Saibot Studios announced.

Physical editions of the game will be available via Lost in Cult:

Here is an overview of the game, via New Blood Interactive:

Tenebris Somnia is a survival horror adventure in the same vein as classics like Silent Hill or Resident Evil, but adapted to a retro 2D environment more typical of the Nintendo Entertainment System or Famicom.

You will struggle to survive while solving puzzles and fighting horrible creatures.

Yet the secrets of the game lie within its cinematics. When you reach certain key points you will see sequences with a completely different aesthetic, made in live action with real actors and created by a professional and award winning film crew.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/tenebris-somnia-launches-october-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Blood Message ‘The Letter’ gameplay walkthrough
item.content:encoded:
Publisher NetEase Games and developer 24 Entertainment Lin’an have released a 19-minute gameplay walkthrough video for cinematic, single-player, linear story-driven action adventure game Blood Message showcasing the “Shazhou City” level.

“[The video] showcases the game’s visceral gameplay experience: realistic combat blended with stealth mechanics,” NetEase Games explained. “Light and heavy attacks, dodge, block, parry, counter, and execution come together to deliver a fluid and brutal combat experience.

“At this point in the story, the protagonist is attempting to escape pursuit and encirclement by enemy forces. Meanwhile, significant events are unfolding in his home city, and his only goal is to return home, find his son, and flee with him.”

Blood Message will be available for consoles and PC.

Watch the footage below.

“The Letter” Gameplay Walkthrough



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/blood-message-the-letter-gameplay-walkthrough
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Bellwright coming to PS5, Xbox Series on June 9
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Currently in Early Access.

Open-world survival crafting game Bellwright launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on June 9, publisher Snail, and publisher and developer Donkey Crew announced.

Bellwright first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on April 23, 2024.

The console versions have been optimized for big screen play with dedicated gamepad support. While the console versions are not specifically labeled “Early Access,” the game will remain in Early Access when the console versions launch.

“We’ve always wanted to bring Bellwright to the largest audience possible, and now PlayStation and Xbox players will be able to play the full game with over two years of major content updates,” said creative director and project lead Florian Hoffreither in a press release.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Framed for the murder of the Prince and sentenced to death by the Crown, you’ve been living in the shadows ever since. After barely dodging an attempt on your life, you find the assassin’s contract that raises many questions—was it just misfortune that you were framed? Or is there more to it? Determined to find the answers, you journey back to the very place you escaped.

Slowly but surely, you will lead a rebellion against your homeland’s oppressive Sovereign to victory, uncovering the truth of your family’s secret along the way. The bells shall ring for freedom once again!

Establish and expand your own settlements, liberate the land and assist its villagers, and recruit others to your cause while learning more about a life you had to leave behind. Your recruits will help you build up the resources and might needed for a stand against the Crown. Command your forces, prove your valor through combat, and cement yourself as the hero of your people.

Key Features

  • Survive and Explore – Gather, hunt, build and craft! Collect and manage resources in a harsh world to survive, and journey through the land for its secrets and adventures! The Crown and its Royal Army is not the only foe in the kingdom…
  • Conquer and Expand – Work your way up from a small camp to becoming the leader of a great rebellion. Improve your relations with the settlements, grow your armies, and liberate regions from the Crown to strengthen your cause. Gain followers with unique knowledge along the way and find new resources to further the technologies of your towns.
  • Resource and Town Management – As you free the villages from the oppressive influence of the Crown, build, manage, and upgrade your own outposts and towns with the help of your recruits. Organize your workers and train the strongest soldiers in the kingdom to grow the rebellion.
  • Skill-Based Directional Combat – Choose your equipment from a variety of medieval weapons and armor. From swords and axes to heavy mauls and polearms, and bows, choose your unique style of fighting and hone your skill in directional combat.
  • Army Command – Lead your armies into battle, commanding your squads and formations, and employ cunning tactics to your advantage. Equip and train your troops the way you want it, and control them on the battlefield to prove your skill and might.
  • Deep Progression – Improve your own skills in combat and survival, train your soldiers and see your workers become master craftsmen. Each new recruit will bring unique knowledge to the table, from crafting better arrows to building advanced structures in your town, so choose wisely. Opportunities for growth are endless!
  • Story and Roleplay – As you expand your armies and influence across the land, unravel your family secrets and learn the truth behind the terrible death of the Prince you were accused of murdering. The mysteries of the kingdom await.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/bellwright-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-on-june-9
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Monster horror simulation game My Cannibal Family announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Puublisher Raw Fur and developer Wolf & Wood have announced My Cannibal FamilyPlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam in 2027. A closed playtest for PC is available now until June 16.

Here is an overview of the game, via Raw Fury:

About

Stuffed into a drum of glowing goo and left for dead by an abandoned rest stop, you emerge a mutated monster with an insatiable new appetite… and a bloodthirsty desire for revenge.

Stalk! Harvest! Feed! You are the terror that lurks amongst the shadows in My Cannibal Family, a gloriously grotesque monster horror sim with cooperative multiplayer for up to four players.

Build a twisted theme park beside a remote highway and use it to lure visitors to a gruesome death – harvesting their bodies to feed your growing family of loveable mutants. Gather resources and construct attractions during the day – then when night arrives, use traps and stealth attacks to eliminate guests within a deadly sandbox of your own creation!

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Build – Use creative building tools to develop a truly unique brand of theme park filled with attractions, decorations and deadly traps. Watch your park grow as you play, from a simple wooden shack to a full labyrinth of entertainment and gory horror!
  • Lure – Your hideous face will terrify visitors, so use attractions, signage and devious building to lead your guests into the shadows. Work behind the curtain, wait for the right moment, then make your move…
  • Harvest – Eliminate guests with a range of tools, weapons and traps, then bag up that tasty meat for later. If someone spots you, they’ll attack or run – don’t let them escape!
  • Feed – Your family hungers! Use any bodies you’ve bagged to satisfy your appetite and feed your growing brood of mutants. Bodies can also be used to unlock new traps, tools and weapons… or even gestate new family members.
  • Manage – Your mutant family are there to help you! Give them names like “Gregg” and assign them tasks, like gathering resources, reviving players…or burlesque dancing.
  • Avenge – Use your growing park business to attract members of the mob crew who left you for dead, then enact terrible revenge upon them! Progress through a campaign that tells a story of love, loss and of course, family.
  • Explore – The area surrounding your park is filled with enemies, bonus resources and hidden secrets to find. Use your radio to tune in on nearby chatter and access side missions that offer additional rewards!
  • More Fun Stuff!
    • Play solo or with friends in online cooperative multiplayer for up to four players, or via split-screen (two players only)
    • Construct the horror theme park of your dreams with a modular building system that also allows you to build underground
    • Six different unlockable park themes, including funhouse, carnival and saloon.
    • Over 15 guns, melee weapons, and throwables, featuring slasher favourites like the machete, drill and harpoon
    • Over 12 traps, including spike walls, saw pits and The Crusher!
    • Over 20 attractions and distractions to entertain your guests with, including ‘The Mesmeriser’, ‘Vortex Tunnel’ and ‘Whack a’ Jelly’
    • Dozens of additional tools and equipment. Lick a frog to buff your stats, or use ziplines to make a quick trip across the park

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/monster-horror-simulation-game-my-cannibal-family-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PowerWash Simulator 2 DLC ‘Star Wars Pack’ launches July 16
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Blast the grime far far away.

PowerWash Simulator 2 downloadable content “Star Wars Pack” will launch on July 16 for $9.99 / £7.99 / €9.99, developer FuturLab announced.

Here is an overview of the downloadable content, via its Steam page:

Step into the Original Trilogy

Set during the events of Star Wars: A New Hope, Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back, and Star Wars: Return of the Jedi, take on the role of P0-W2, a Class Five cleaning droid. Your average assignment quickly spirals into being commandeered to carry out the Empire’s dirty work, before clearing the way for the Rebel Alliance. Rebellions are built on hope, and soap.

Custom Equipment for a More Civilized Age

Dirt is no match for a water blaster at your side, kid, and this one’s got enough force to remove even the grimiest globs of grease in the galaxy. Take aim at muck with a bespoke power washer, an elegant weapon for a more civilized—and soapy—age.

The Galaxy Awaits

Your mission takes you from the sandstorms of Tatooine to the ice fields of Hoth, with a smattering of stops along the Outer Rim. Get up close and personal with iconic Star Wars locations, ships, and droids like never before, uncovering every last detail as you blast away the dirt. There’s a whole galaxy out there—delight in cleaning it up.

Fly Solo or Form an Alliance

Follow your filth-fighting path alone or forge an alliance. Play through the campaign solo or team up to become the second most iconic droid duo in the galaxy. In Free Play, form an alliance with up to four faithful friends.

PowerWash Simulator 2 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

DLC “Star Wars Pack” Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/powerwash-simulator-2-dlc-star-wars-pack-launches-july-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 3D Metroidvania action adventure game DeadRoot announced for Xbox Series, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

From Robots at Midnight developer Finish Line Games.

Robots at Midnight developer Finish Line Games has announced 3D Metroidvania action adventure game DeadRoot for Xbox Series and PC (Steam). A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Delve into a 3D Metroidvania world and uncover its secrets. Cut through hordes of foes and square off against colossal, screen-filling bosses. Every swing carries power and momentum in a ruthless, fast-paced combat experience. Sever limbs and trigger brutal executions. All the fun, none of the cleanup.

Key Features

  • Brutal Combat – You’re a small snail. Your foes are bigger, meaner, and out for blood. Flies swarm, rats stalk, and worse things wait deeper down. Impale the hardiest creatures. Finish them with bloody executions. Nature is brutal.
  • Learn and Gear Up – Friends and mentors will teach you new abilities and guide you on your path. Hunt down and acquire powerful weapons and armor. You’ll need every tool you find to traverse the world and solve its puzzles.
  • Explore and Reveal – Explore interconnected ruins and dungeons from a perspective you’ve never seen before. Squeeze into hidden paths, climb walls, and fire arrows at distant levers. Every obstacle you overcome pulls back another layer of a mysterious world.
  • Beneath the Roots – Venture through fallen kingdoms where nature is plunged into chaos. Whatever’s killing this world is waiting in the dark place, deep beneath the roots. In your hands you hold the one chance to restore balance.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/3d-metroidvania-action-adventure-game-deadroot-announced-for-xbox-series-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Road of Dust and Sorrow adds PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and Switch versions
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Cozy survival horror adventure game due out in 2026.

Cozy survival horror adventure game The Road of Dust and Sorrow will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and Switch alongside its previously announced PC (Steam) version in 2026, publisher Silver Lining Interactive and developed Painted Black Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Silver Lining Interactive:

About

Dive into a story-driven survival horror adventure inspired by classics like Resident Evil and Silent Hill. A cure designed to end famine became humanity’s ruin. The failed experiment twisted people into feral creatures called Dusters, driven by primal hunger. Katherine and her daughter Ava roam the remnants of civilization, searching for a safer future. Their journey draws the attention of a Preacher and his mysterious cult, driven by an ancient hunger, they see humans as fertile soil.

A Fallen World

Streets lie abandoned, buildings rot from the inside out, and vegetation is growing back at an accelerated rate. Traces of the past linger, in homes—barricaded for protection, offices with supplies scattered, and stores picked clean of supplies. Humanity is shaped by desperation, how far will you go to survive?

  • ❮
  • ❯

Fight for Your Life

Claw your way through decaying streets, bloodthirsty monsters, locked rooms, and forgotten corridors. Solve environmental puzzles, uncover hidden paths, and survive encounters with feral Dusters for a chance to reach safety. Proceed with caution every door can lead to salvation… or devastation.

Protect What Matters Most

Protect Ava at all cost. The world can die but she must live. Every step draws you deeper into a place that wants you gone. No one will save you, but you can fight. You can run. You can try to get her to safety.

Key Features

  • Story-driven linear gameplay.
  • Dystopian survival.
  • Exploration and puzzles.
  • Beautiful pixel art.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/the-road-of-dust-and-sorrow-adds-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-switch-versions
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
